<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band14_chunk004.pdf#page=23 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band14 p194 -->

<!-- header: GEISENFELD -->

<!-- header: GEISENFELD -->


[[File:Band14_chunk004_p023_img001.jpg|thumb|C Allegorische Darstellung der Klostergelübde (Melchior Puchner 1728)]]



[[File:Band14_chunk004_p023_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band14 p195 -->
